summary: Training System Testing Complete. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working - Training Center page, Schedule Session modal, session cards, tabs, analytics, and live session view all functional. Daily.co video API is MOCKED (simulation mode).

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts click events on chat send button in bottom-right corner
ui_bugs.workaround: User can press Enter key to send chat messages

passed_tests: POST /api/training/sessions/{id}/chat - Cannot chat in scheduled session (returns 400)
POST /api/training/sessions/{id}/breakout-rooms - Cannot create when feature disabled (returns 400)
Validation: Session title min length enforced (returns 422)
UI: Training Center page loads correctly
UI: Schedule Session modal works with all form fields
UI: Session cards display correctly with status badges
UI: Tabs (Upcoming, Past Sessions, Recordings) work
UI: Analytics cards display (Total Sessions, Attendees, Training Hours, Avg Duration)
UI: Live session view displays with controls
UI: Chat panel visible in live session
critical_code_review_comments: Training system implementation is complete and well-structured
All session types (training, onboarding, live_support, webinar) work correctly
Session lifecycle (scheduled → live → ended/cancelled) properly managed
Chat functionality works only during live sessions (correct behavior)
Breakout rooms feature toggle works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created during backend testing were cleaned up. One existing session 'New Employee Onboarding' was used for live session testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training system testing complete. The system supports 4 session types: training, onboarding, live_support, webinar. Sessions can be scheduled, started, joined, and ended. Chat works only during live sessions. Breakout rooms can be created when enabled. Daily.co video API is in simulation mode (no API key configured). Analytics endpoint provides session counts, attendee counts, and duration metrics.

features: Schedule Session modal with all form fields

mocked_apis.Daily.co: MOCKED - Video conferencing in simulation mode (no API key configured)
